title: OpenWork brand kit config
description: Per-brand source of truth for the OpenWork brand kit. Put one brand.json and one logo.svg under brands/<id>/. Shared defaults are merged from brands/_defaults.json.

id.description: Stable lowercase brand id. CI discovers this from brands/<id>/brand.json.

extends.description: Optional path to another JSON config. The brand file is merged on top, useful for one-off variants.

features.description: Per-group toggles for the brand kit's override features. Everything defaults to true; set a key to false to leave that surface stock. On apply, a disabled group's working-tree edits are reset and its generated files removed.

brandName.description: Replace the standalone word 'OpenWork' with brand.name in UI strings, window title, and locales.

accentColor.description: Apply brand.accentColor as the default UI accent.

assets.description: Generate the web and desktop asset set from brand.image.

desktopIdentity.description: Rewrite electron-builder appId/productName and the deep-link scheme.

providers.description: Generate opencode.json with the default model and (when wired) filter the provider picker to providers.allowed.

welcomeOverride.description: Generate the brand-owned welcome page + vite.brandkit.config.mts reroute.

cloudHide.description: Master switch for the cloud-hiding ops. Effective only when cloud.hide is also true.

language.description: Master switch for the single-language variant ops. Effective only for a non-English build (language.default or BRANDKIT_LANG).

trim.description: Trim the app surface: settings reduced to Preferences/Permissions/Extensions + AI/Appearance/Environment, no Marketplace pane, no Docs/Feedback buttons, browser new-tab opens about:blank.

language.description: Single-language variant. A non-'en' default builds a hard-locked edition: that locale is forced on every launch and the Appearance language switcher is hidden. Overridable at build time with the BRANDKIT_LANG env var, so one checkout can emit both an English and a localized installer.

default.description: Locale id matching a file in apps/app/src/i18n/locales (e.g. 'zh'). 'en' = normal multi-language app.

name.description: User-facing product name. Replaces the standalone word 'OpenWork' in UI strings, window title, and packaged app name.

shortName.description: Optional short name for tight spaces. Defaults to `name`.

nameByLang.description: Language-aware display name shown in the UI + window title (e.g. {"zh": "Mini助手"}). `name` stays the ASCII base for appId/scheme/artifact/install-dir.

accentColor.description: Radix color family used as the UI accent (maps to --dls-accent* CSS vars).

image.description: Path to the one canonical logo/icon image, relative to this brand.json. SVG and common raster images are supported; build-time derivatives are generated automatically.

assets.description: Legacy per-file asset paths. New brand definitions should use image instead.

appId.description: Reverse-DNS bundle id for the packaged app (electron-builder appId).

deepLinkScheme.description: Custom URL scheme for deep links (replaces 'openwork'). Lowercase, no ':' or '//'.

productName.description: Packaged app / exe / .app filename (electron-builder productName). Defaults to brand.name. Must be filesystem-safe.

updateFeed.description: GitHub releases feed for electron-updater. Without it a shipped branded app auto-updates itself back into stock OpenWork from upstream's releases.

providers.description: Which LLM providers the distributor allows. End users still enter their own API key.

allowed.description: OpenCode provider ids to expose (e.g. 'openrouter', 'anthropic', 'openai'). Others are hidden from the picker.

models.description: Optional model whitelist within the allowed providers. An entry ending in '/' is a vendor prefix that matches every model of that vendor (e.g. 'anthropic/', 'openai/', 'minimax/', 'z-ai/'); any other entry matches a model id exactly (e.g. 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-5'). Empty/omitted = all models of allowed providers.

displayName.description: Friendly label rendered instead of the raw model id (e.g. "Clinic AI").

displayNameByLang.description: Language-aware displayName override, keyed by locale id.

baseURL.description: Override the provider's API base URL so requests route through a branded gateway instead of the upstream (e.g. "https://api.badlandslabs.com/v1"). Applied to both opencode.json and the packaged runtime config.

modelsCatalogUrl.description: Override the opencode model-catalog origin (OPENCODE_MODELS_URL). opencode fetches '<url>api.json'. Point it at a gateway that serves a curated catalog so the model picker no longer populates from the upstream mirror (e.g. 'https://api.badlandslabs.com/'). null = leave the app default.

keyCard.description: Override the inline API-key card's copy and validation so it presents the branded gateway instead of the underlying provider.

label.description: Provider name shown on the key card (e.g. "Badlands Labs").

keysUrl.description: "Get a key" link target, or null to hide it.

validateUrl.description: URL the card GETs with the pasted key to validate it (200 = valid, 401/403 = invalid). Must be CORS-open. null skips inline validation.

keyPrefix.description: Expected key prefix for the reject-hint, or null to omit (avoids leaking the upstream key format).

hide.description: Hide all OpenWork Cloud / Den surfaces (cloud settings group, sign-in entry points, workers).

requireSignin.description: Whether to force account sign-in. Brand-kit default is false.

welcomeByLang.description: Per-language overrides layered on top of `welcome` for a single-language build (e.g. welcomeByLang.zh for BRANDKIT_LANG=zh). Same shape as `welcome`.

welcome.description: Content for the brand-owned welcome page. Generated into brand/overrides/welcome-page.tsx and served via the reroute plugin — the app's original welcome-page.tsx is never modified.

showSignIn.description: Show the 'Joining a team? Sign in' link. Default false.

title.description: Hero title. Omit to fall back to the app's i18n string.

subtitle.description: Hero subtitle. Omit to fall back to the app's i18n string.

getStartedHeading.description: Heading above the numbered steps. Default 'Get started'.

getStartedLabel.description: Primary button label. Omit to fall back to the app's i18n string.

showcaseTitle.description: Heading for the right-hand showcase panel, one array entry per line.

features.description: Feature cards in the showcase panel.
